title: neillia uekii var. typica
intro: Neillia uekii var. typica, also known as Chinese Neillia or Tian Hua Fen, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of China and Japan, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neillia uekii var. typica include its ability to reduce fever, relieve cough and sore throat, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Neillia uekii var. typica is often used as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
